macroTerritories.name: Value & Savings
macroTerritories.desc: Brands and products that deliver the best price-to-quality ratio, making smart shopping accessible to all.

macroTerritories.name: Health & Wellbeing
macroTerritories.desc: Brands rooted in organic, natural and free-from claims that place consumer health at the center.

macroTerritories.name: Quality & Freshness
macroTerritories.desc: Premium, artisanal and farm-fresh products that elevate everyday consumption into something exceptional.

macroTerritories.name: Convenience & Speed
macroTerritories.desc: Practical solutions for busy lives — quick preparation, easy formats and seamless purchasing.

macroTerritories.name: Sustainability
macroTerritories.desc: Eco-certified, locally sourced and zero-waste brands that make responsible consumption the default.

macroTerritories.name: Safe & Trusted
macroTerritories.desc: Certified and consistently reliable brands that families can count on every time.

macroTerritories.name: Experience & Lifestyle
macroTerritories.desc: Brands that inspire discovery, pleasure and self-expression through premium and unique consumption experiences.

territories.name: Smart Saver
territories.desc: Brands that empower price-conscious consumers to get the best value without compromise, through smart pricing and consistent quality.

territories.name: Family Bundle
territories.desc: Brands that help families stretch their budget further through bulk formats, multi-packs and loyalty rewards designed for household purchasing.
territories.activates: Pride in providing for the family

territories.name: Deal Hunter
territories.desc: Brands that thrill the promotional shopper — those who live for weekly offers, cashback and the satisfaction of a great deal.
territories.activates: Excitement and the thrill of saving

territories.name: Healthy Choice
territories.desc: Brands certified as organic, natural or free-from, addressing the growing consumer demand for transparent and health-forward products.

territories.name: Premium Fresh
territories.desc: Brands that deliver exceptional quality through artisanal production, premium sourcing and farm-fresh credentials that elevate everyday meals.
territories.activates: Pride and pleasure in superior quality

territories.name: Quick & Easy
territories.desc: Brands built for modern convenience — ready meals, grab-and-go formats and easy-prep products for consumers who value their time.
territories.activates: Relief and confidence in daily routine

territories.name: Conscious Living
territories.desc: Brands that align with the values of eco-conscious consumers — zero waste, local sourcing, fair trade and carbon-neutral commitments.

territories.name: Trusted Quality
territories.desc: Brands that earn long-term loyalty through certified quality, allergen transparency and the consistency consumers depend on.

territories.name: Self-Reward
territories.desc: Brands that turn everyday shopping into small acts of indulgence — premium picks and treats that celebrate personal moments.

territories.name: Explore & Discover
territories.desc: Brands that inspire culinary adventure — international flavors, specialty imports and unique finds that make shopping an experience.
territories.activates: Curiosity and openness to the new

brands.name: LumiSelect
brands.desc: Grupo Lumina's premium private label — curated from the best sources to deliver exceptional quality at a fair price.
brands.role: Premium anchor — elevates the store brand perception and drives trade-up from core range.
brands.bci: Quality-conscious shoppers who want the best but trust their retailer to find it for them.
brands.explanationMacro: LumiSelect anchors the Quality & Freshness territory by delivering consistently superior products.

brands.name: LumiValue
brands.desc: The everyday essential brand for families — consistent quality at prices that make budgeting easier without sacrificing satisfaction.
brands.role: Volume driver — broad penetration across household staples for the price-conscious family shopper.
brands.bci: Families who need reliable quality at affordable prices for their weekly shop.
brands.explanationMacro: LumiValue serves the Family Bundle territory with trusted essentials at scale.

brands.name: LumiVivo
brands.desc: Grupo Lumina's health-first brand — certified organic, natural and free-from products for consumers who put wellbeing at the top of their list.
brands.role: Health & wellness specialist — captures the fast-growing natural and organic shopper segment.
brands.bci: Health-conscious individuals and families who demand clean labels and certified organic credentials.
brands.explanationMacro: LumiVivo is the authority in the Health & Wellbeing territory.

brands.name: LumiVerde
brands.desc: Grupo Lumina's sustainable brand — eco-certified, locally sourced and zero-waste products for the environmentally conscious consumer.
brands.role: Sustainability leader — signals Grupo Lumina's commitment to a better planet while growing the conscious consumer base.
brands.bci: Eco-conscious shoppers who refuse to compromise between living well and doing good.
brands.explanationMacro: LumiVerde drives the Conscious Living territory with end-to-end sustainability credentials.

brands.name: LumiCasa
brands.desc: The trusted household brand — certified, safe and always in stock. LumiCasa is the go-to choice for families who value consistency above all.
brands.role: Trust anchor — builds long-term loyalty through certified quality and reliable availability.
brands.bci: Families and caregivers who prioritize safety, reliability and transparent labeling for household products.
brands.explanationMacro: LumiCasa is the pillar of the Safe & Trusted territory within the portfolio.

brands.name: LumiGourmet
brands.desc: Grupo Lumina's ultra-premium discovery brand — unique specialty imports, international flavors and curated gourmet experiences.
brands.role: Experience leader — elevates the retailer's prestige and attracts the adventurous premium shopper.
brands.bci: Curious, food-passionate consumers who see shopping as exploration and love discovering world-class products.
brands.explanationMacro: LumiGourmet anchors the Explore & Discover territory in the Experience & Lifestyle macro.

brands.name: FreshMart
brands.desc: A bold challenger brand in the premium fresh segment — known for vibrant packaging and aggressive farm-to-shelf sourcing.
brands.role: Premium challenger — competes directly with LumiSelect in the Quality & Freshness territory.
brands.bci: Quality-seeking shoppers who respond to bold, energetic brand communication and fresh provenance claims.
brands.explanationMacro: FreshMart fights for leadership in the Premium Fresh territory with high-energy positioning.

brands.name: Naturalis
brands.desc: An established organic brand with a loyal following among health-conscious consumers — natural, minimal and always trusted.
brands.role: Organic core player — holds significant share in the Healthy Choice territory with strong distribution.
brands.bci: Committed health-first shoppers who have trusted Naturalis for years and respond to minimal, honest branding.
brands.explanationMacro: Naturalis is the incumbent in the Healthy Choice territory that LumiVivo must displace.

brands.name: Savoria
brands.desc: A sophisticated gourmet import brand with a curated catalogue of fine foods from Europe and Asia — the connoisseur's choice.
brands.role: Gourmet specialist — competes with LumiGourmet through deeper catalogue and stronger provenance storytelling.
brands.bci: Affluent food enthusiasts who equate authenticity with prestige and are willing to pay for the real thing.
brands.explanationMacro: Savoria challenges LumiGourmet in the Explore & Discover territory with deeper premium credentials.

brands.name: EcoBasket
brands.desc: A zero-waste focused brand gaining rapid traction among urban eco-conscious shoppers — certified, local and radically transparent.
brands.role: Sustainability challenger — pressures LumiVerde with stronger zero-waste credentials and community activism.
brands.bci: Younger, urban eco-activists who want their purchase decisions to make a measurable environmental difference.
brands.explanationMacro: EcoBasket occupies the core tier of Conscious Living and competes for the sustainability-first shopper.

brands.name: Price King
brands.desc: The no-frills value champion — aggressive pricing and a star loyalty programme that keeps cost-driven shoppers coming back.
brands.role: Value disruptor — anchors the lowest price tier in Smart Saver and drives category commoditisation.
brands.bci: Extremely price-sensitive shoppers who prioritise cost above all else and respond to simple promotional mechanics.
brands.explanationMacro: Price King occupies the value tier in Smart Saver, setting the floor for competitive pricing.

brands.name: QuickGo
brands.desc: A digital-native convenience brand built for on-demand delivery — ready meals and grab-and-go formats designed for the time-poor urban consumer.
brands.role: Convenience disruptor — leads in digital convenience and threatens the Quick & Easy territory through rapid fulfilment.
brands.bci: Busy urban professionals who prioritise speed and ease and are comfortable ordering via app.
brands.explanationMacro: QuickGo is the digital-first challenger in Quick & Easy, competing on delivery speed and app experience.

products.name: LumiSelect Arbório Rice
products.desc: Premium Italian-origin Arbório rice — perfect for risottos and everyday meals. Sourced from certified farms and selected for grain consistency.

products.name: LumiSelect Reserve Coffee
products.desc: Single-origin specialty coffee from high-altitude farms — freshly roasted and packaged to preserve its exceptional flavor profile.

products.name: LumiValue Family Pasta Pack
products.desc: A 3kg multi-pack of durum wheat pasta — the family staple that keeps everyone fed without stretching the budget.

products.name: LumiValue Bulk Cooking Oil
products.desc: 5L blended cooking oil for everyday use — reliable quality at an unbeatable price per litre for high-volume household cooking.

products.name: LumiVivo Organic Granola
products.desc: Certified organic granola made with whole grains, seeds and natural sweeteners — no artificial additives, just honest nutrition.

products.name: LumiVerde Zero Waste Dish Soap
products.desc: Plant-based dish soap in 100% recyclable packaging — effective cleaning with zero environmental compromise.

products.name: LumiCasa Multi-Surface Cleaner
products.desc: A certified, family-safe multi-surface cleaner — tested by dermatologists and consistently available across all Grupo Lumina stores.

products.name: LumiGourmet Japanese Ramen Kit
products.desc: An authentic Japanese ramen kit — imported noodles, tare sauce and toppings sourced directly from artisan producers in Japan.

products.name: FreshMart Seasonal Veg Box
products.desc: A weekly curated box of seasonal vegetables sourced directly from local farms — fresh, vibrant and delivered to the store the same morning.

products.name: Naturalis Organic Yoghurt
products.desc: Creamy organic yoghurt made with milk from certified free-range farms — no additives, no artificial flavours, just pure goodness.

products.name: Savoria Black Truffle Pasta
products.desc: Artisan egg pasta infused with Périgord black truffle — imported from a fourth-generation pasta maker in Umbria, Italy.

products.name: EcoBasket Refill Detergent
products.desc: A concentrated plant-based detergent sold in fully compostable refill pouches — designed for the zero-waste household.

products.name: Price King Everyday Rice
products.desc: 5kg long-grain white rice at the market's lowest price — simple, reliable and always available. No frills, just value.

products.name: QuickGo Chicken Wrap Kit
products.desc: A complete chicken wrap kit — marinated strips, flatbreads and sauces ready in under 10 minutes. Designed for the rush-hour kitchen.
